title: Daily Creative Queue
summary: Drafted two new carousel briefs (Day 4 timestamp escalation, typing-indicator anxiety) and moved both from Idea to Research.
contextSummary: Backlog had 6 ideas in Idea status. Picked the two with strongest single-visual hooks (same-thread timestamp escalation; typing dots as horror villain). Skipped "family group chat horror movie" — overlaps with existing Group Chat Shame brief. Skipped talking-head formats (out of Image Creator scope).
